title: Latest News from Science Magazine
description: Keyword search result for Alerts: News Weekly Headlines -- New results matching your keyword search query (updated daily).

items.title: AI models have a troubling knack for discovering legal loopholes
items.description: AIs on their own found ways to exploit regulations and evade current safeguards

items.title: French physicist and media star loses doctorate after plagiarism investigation
items.description: University punishes Étienne Klein after investigation shows he plagiarized part of his Ph.D. thesis

items.title: New documentary follows researchers’ increasingly fraught career path
items.description: The Endless Frontier traces the lives of three scientists as they train students and deal with funding pressures

items.title: Metal-driven chemical reaction in deep sea may explain origin of life
items.description: Group offers new scenario for how cells came to rely on phosphate molecules to build DNA and store energy

items.title: After years of opposition, Mexico’s president is reconsidering fracking
items.description: The government has tasked a group of scientists with assessing new technologies for “sustainable” oil and gas drilling—but many experts say it’s a fantasy

items.title: How did the cruise ship hantavirus outbreak start? Scientists are investigating new scenarios
items.description: Understanding how the first patient became infected may shed new light on Andes virus’ transmission patterns and incubation period

items.title: Deep-sea vehicles spot ‘alien’ sharks deep beneath the waves in the Pacific
items.description: Goblin sharks have never before been filmed in their natural habitat

items.title: The ocean current that warms Europe may be more resilient than feared
items.description: Studies of the Atlantic's circulation find signs of both weakening and unexpected stability in the face of global warming

items.title: Laser-boosted microscopes could reveal new drug targets, sharpen views inside cells
items.description: Enhanced cryo–electron microscopy promises to bring previously elusive proteins into view

items.title: If scientists discover aliens, they have a plan for ‘disclosure day’
items.description: New guidelines aim to help scientists verify, communicate, and manage evidence of extraterrestrial intelligence
